name: Vintage Brass Table Lamp - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Decorate and light up your space in vintage style with the Vintage Brass Table Lamp from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia . This table lamp features an empire shade that complements the brass-finish base for a traditional look you'll love. Designed with a one-way light setting, this table lamp is easy to operate with the socket turn knob rotary switch.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
